_readme: Composition record — how this target's composed linear stack is BUILT from per-line stacks (contract: datasets/README.md). Absent file = the set processes as an ordinary single stack.

extract._note: measured on this data: Ha extracts half-size from the R photosites with XPIXSZ correctly doubled (3.76->7.52um), OIII full-size; resample=oiii brings OIII to the same half size so no channel carries invented detail. The full-size path (native Ha + 2x drizzle) is the BACKLOG upgrade and needs measured dither coverage first.
